seo.title: Commercial Kitchen Design Services — AIM Integrated Designs
seo.description: End-to-end commercial kitchen design: workflow-driven layouts, equipment matrices, MEP coordination, exhaust calculations, and health-code compliance packages for restaurants, hotels, hospitals, and corporate food service.

jsonLd.description: End-to-end commercial kitchen design including workflow-driven layouts, equipment matrices, MEP coordination, exhaust calculations, and health-code compliance for restaurants, hotels, hospitals, and corporate food service operations.

hero.title: Kitchens engineered for the pressure of real service.
hero.subtitle: We design commercial kitchens that perform under daily volume — from fine-dining restaurants to high-throughput hospital production lines.
hero.imageAlt: Commercial kitchen cook line with stainless steel equipment

about.title: Workflow first—then equipment, MEP, and code.
body: Every commercial kitchen we design starts with the operator's menu, throughput targets, and labor model. Equipment and zone adjacencies follow from that — never the other way around.

Our deliverables include equipment floor plans, equipment elevations, mechanical/electrical/plumbing rough-in coordination, exhaust hood and make-up air calculations, equipment specification schedules, and complete health-department submission packages.
We sit between the operator, the architect, the GC, and the MEP engineers — translating menu strategy into a buildable kitchen package that opens on schedule and passes inspection on the first walk.
